values.title: Values
values.rigorDescription: Clear specifications, code reviews, test coverage and tracked deliveries.
values.transparencyDescription: Honest communication about timelines, risks and technical constraints.
values.innovationDescription: Modern solutions (Next.js, Firebase, SaaS) tailored to business context.
values.engagementDescription: Long‑term collaboration, focus on delivered value and team relationships.
values.codeQualityDescription: Clear patterns, controlled technical debt and lightweight but useful documentation.
values.excellenceDescription: Striving for a very high level of quality in UX, code and performance.
values.speedDescription: Fast, iterative delivery without sacrificing stability or technical quality.
values.efficiencyDescription: Focus on concrete business impact, the right architecture choices and time‑to‑market.
